target:
ssh notebook '
set -e
echo "=== [1/4] Git reset auf origin/main ==="
cd ~/.claude
git fetch origin
git reset --hard origin/main
echo "Git: $(git log --oneline -1)"

echo ""
echo "=== [2/4] bun PATH in settings.json wiederherstellen ==="
python3 - <<PYEOF
import json
path = "/home/herbert/.claude/settings.json"
with open(path) as f:
    s = json.load(f)
s.setdefault("env", {})["PATH"] = "/home/herbert/.bun/bin:/home/herbert/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin"
with open(path, "w") as f:
    j
